steps.name: Phase 0: Foundry Migration & Compilation
steps.description: Convert Hardhat project to Foundry and ensure successful compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/scouting-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the scouting-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will migrate the project to Foundry (if needed) and verify compilation artifacts are generated successfully.

steps.name: Compilation Check Decision
steps.description: Check if COMPILATION_FAILED.md exists to determine if workflow should stop

steps.name: Ensure Dependencies Installed
steps.description: Detect dependency manager and install dependencies if missing
steps.prompt: REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo '.'); if [ -f soldeer.lock ] || grep -q '\[soldeer\]' foundry.toml 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Detected soldeer project, installing dependencies...'; timeout 120 forge soldeer install || echo 'soldeer install timed out or failed, continuing...'; fi; if [ -f "$REPO_ROOT/.gitmodules" ]; then echo 'Detected git submodule project, installing dependencies...'; git -C "$REPO_ROOT" submodule update --init --recursive || echo 'submodule update failed, continuing...'; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then echo 'Detected pnpm project, installing dependencies...'; command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g pnpm; timeout 120 pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile; elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then echo 'Detected yarn project, installing dependencies...'; timeout 120 yarn install; else echo 'Detected npm project, installing dependencies...'; timeout 120 npm install --loglevel=error; fi || echo 'Package install failed or timed out, continuing...'; fi; if [ ! -d lib/forge-std ]; then echo 'Installing forge-std...'; forge install foundry-rs/forge-std --no-commit || echo 'forge-std install failed, continuing...'; fi; echo 'Verifying compilation...'; forge build

steps.name: Phase 1: Contract Analysis & Scaffolding Preparation
steps.description: Identify contracts for invariant testing and prepare scaffolding requirements
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/scouting-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the scouting-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

decision.NOTE: Contracts to scaffold file created, continue to setting up fuzzing
Contracts to scaffold file not found, retry analysis

steps.name: Suppress Lint on Build
steps.description: Disable forge linter during build to prevent lint warnings in third-party code from blocking scaffolding
steps.prompt:
if ! grep -q '\[lint\]' foundry.toml 2>/dev/null; then printf '
[lint]
lint_on_build = false
' >> foundry.toml; elif ! grep -q 'lint_on_build' foundry.toml 2>/dev/null; then sed -i '/\[lint\]/a lint_on_build = false' foundry.toml; else sed -i 's/lint_on_build = true/lint_on_build = false/' foundry.toml; fi; echo 'lint_on_build set to false in foundry.toml'

steps.name: Generate Recon Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate fuzzing scaffolding based on contracts-to-scaffold.json
steps.prompt: SCAFFOLD_FILE=$([ -f magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json ] && echo 'magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json' || echo '../magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json'); npm_config_cache=/tmp/npm-cache npx -y recon-generate@latest --include "$(jq -r '.source_contracts | join(",")' $SCAFFOLD_FILE)" --force

steps.name: Clean Flattened Imports
steps.description: Remove imports of flattened contracts from scaffolding to prevent identifier collisions
steps.prompt: ROOT=${RECON_FOUNDRY_ROOT:-.}; FLATTENED=$(find "$ROOT/src" -name '*.flattened.sol' -o -name '*.flat.sol' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FLATTENED" ]; then echo 'Found flattened contracts, cleaning imports from scaffolding...'; for f in $FLATTENED; do BASENAME=$(basename "$f"); echo "  Removing imports of $BASENAME from test/recon/"; find "$ROOT/test/recon" -name '*.sol' -exec sed -i "/$BASENAME/d" {} +; done; find "$ROOT/test/recon" -name '*.sol' -exec sed -i '/flattened\//d' {} +; echo 'Flattened import cleanup done.'; else echo 'No flattened contracts found, skipping cleanup.'; fi
